_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.

_contextSnippet: The genetically engineered mouse models develop MPNST-like tumors (referred as mMPNST) at distinct anatomical locations in dermal, paraspinal, and sciatic nerves
details: Develop MPNST-like tumors at distinct anatomical locations in dermal, paraspinal, and sciatic nerves
